name: Usem Mena
description_short: USEM Mena Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving the Mena, Arkansas area since 1967, offering vehicle loans, fixed-rate loans, and share accounts to over 480 members.
description_long:
USEM Mena Federal Credit Union was established in 1967 and has been serving members in Mena, Arkansas for over 55 years. As a federally-chartered credit union, it operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned cooperative financial institution regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). The organization has grown to serve over 480 members with assets exceeding $2.159 million.

The credit union offers traditional lending products focused primarily on vehicle financing, including new car loans, used car loans, and fixed-rate loans. Members have access to online banking services through their website at usem.virtualcu.net, allowing them to manage accounts remotely. The institution provides share accounts (savings) and related deposit products typical of credit union memberships. A loan calculator is available on their website to help members estimate monthly payments based on loan amount, down payment, interest rate, and amortization period.

USEM Mena distinguishes itself through deep community roots in rural Arkansas and personalized service. Credit union manager Lisa Doughty is noted as available to assist members. The institution maintains limited but consistent lobby hours (Tuesday–Thursday, 12:30 PM–4:30 PM) at their single location on North Morrow Street in Mena. Members can contact the credit union by phone at (479) 385-2810 or email at manager@usem-creditunion.com for detailed information about rates and services.

As a small, community-focused credit union, USEM Mena is best suited for residents and employees in the Mena area seeking competitive rates on vehicle loans and basic financial services. The limited lobby hours and single physical location may be restrictive for members requiring frequent in-person service. The credit union's product offerings appear narrower compared to larger institutions, focusing primarily on lending rather than comprehensive financial services.
services: Credit union manager consultation and assistance
In-person lobby service at Mena location
pros: Member-owned not-for-profit structure with profits returned to members through competitive rates
Established track record serving the Mena community for over 55 years (founded 1967)
Online banking available for account management and transactions
Loan calculator tool on website for transparent rate and payment estimation
Direct manager contact (Lisa Doughty) available for personalized member assistance
Assets over $2.159 million provide institutional stability
Phone and email support channels for member inquiries and service
cons: Very limited lobby hours (only Tuesday–Thursday, 12:30 PM–4:30 PM) restricts in-person access
Single physical location in Mena, Arkansas may be inconvenient for non-local members
Limited product offerings with primary focus on vehicle loans rather than comprehensive banking services
Small membership base (480 members) may result in fewer competitive advantages than larger credit unions
Website provides general information but no specific current interest rates listed publicly
best_for: Mena, Arkansas residents and employees seeking competitive vehicle loans
People who value community-focused, member-owned financial institutions
Borrowers looking for used or new car financing with personal service
Members comfortable with limited branch hours and online banking as primary access
diagnosis: USEM Mena Federal Credit Union is best for Mena, Arkansas residents seeking competitive vehicle loans with personalized, community-focused service. The primary caveat is the very limited lobby hours (Tuesday–Thursday afternoons only) and single-location model, which makes it impractical for members unable to visit during those windows or for those outside the immediate Mena area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Usem Mena — Credit Union in MENA, AR | CreditDoc
meta_description: Usem Mena — NCUA-insured credit union in MENA, AR. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
